name: flame-chart-js
when_to_use: 把带时间轴的 span/调用数据渲成可缩放、可平移的时间型 flame chart / 性能时间线时用它,而非手写 canvas——原生在时间轴缩放、span 命中测试、按调用深度嵌套上失败。区别于目录里的堆栈型 flame graph:d3-flame-graph/speedscope 是按栈聚合(value 权重),flame-chart-js 是时间型(start+duration 落时间轴);perf-cascade 专做 HAR。
why_valuable: 可缩放、刻度正确、命中测试可靠的时间轴 flame 渲染器是 canvas 重活,AI 手写通常昂贵且有 bug。flame-chart-js 从 span/节点数据渲出时间型 flame chart、marks 与多轨 waterfall,自带缩放/平移交互。

data_in.note: data 是节点树,每节点 { name, start, duration, children? };start/duration 同一时间单位(常为 ms),落共享时间轴的绝对坐标;children 按调用深度嵌套。渲染进一个显式尺寸的 canvas,canvas 必须给像素 width/height(禁 vh)。

data.name: string —— 节点标签
data.color?: string —— 该节点颜色,默认按 name 派生
data.children?: FlameChartNode[] —— 子节点(嵌套 span),默认无

schema.colors?: Record<string,string> —— 按类型名映射颜色,默认自动
schema.marks?: [{ shortName, fullName, timestamp, color }] —— 时间轴标记,默认无
schema.settings?: object —— 样式/表头覆盖,默认内置

spec.note: 渲进提供的 canvas,canvas.width/height 必须是显式像素(读容器 clientWidth + 定高 400);禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3),尺寸变化时重设 canvas.width。

example._why: 节点树语义直白,minimal 给一层嵌套展示 start/duration/children。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;节点选中/缩放状态若需外传,由消费 AI 直接接 flame-chart-js 原生事件(chart.on('select',...))并按载体处理,不预设统一事件契约。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:纯 canvas 无 head/worker/wasm 足迹,理论可用,待真机渲染确认
carriers.widget: supported:canvas 落 shadow;监听仅挂在 canvas 元素上,无 CSS/head/worker 注入
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm/uplink 依赖

isolation.evidence: API verified vs flame-chart-js@3.3.0: +esm exports 含 `{rt as FlameChart, Le as FlameChartContainer, ...plugins}`。dist/flame-chart.d.ts:`class FlameChart` 构造签名 `constructor({canvas, data, marks, waterfall, timeframeTimeseries, timeseries, colors, settings, plugins}: FlameChartOptions)`,FlameChartOptions.canvas:HTMLCanvasElement 必填、data?:FlameChartNodes;方法 setNodes/setMarks/setWaterfall。dist/types.d.ts:`interface FlameChartNode { name:string; start:number; duration:number; color?:string; children?:FlameChartNode[] }`——schema data/colors/marks/settings 精确消费。全局副作用 grep = 0(无 document.head/body、无 new Worker、无 WebAssembly、无 window resize 监听);渲进提供的 canvas,交互监听挂在该 canvas 上。peerDeps 的 react/use-resize-observer 仅供 /react 子路径,vanilla FlameChart 入口不拉。最干净的一条:shadow-safe、无 CSS/head/worker/wasm。

en.when_to_use: Use it to render timeline-based span/call data as a zoomable, pannable time-based flame chart or performance timeline, instead of hand-writing canvas, because native implementations fail at timeline zoom, span hit testing, and nesting by call depth. Unlike stack-based flame graphs in the catalog, d3-flame-graph/speedscope aggregate by stack (value weight), while flame-chart-js is time-based (start+duration on a timeline); perf-cascade specializes in HAR.
en.why_valuable: A zoomable timeline renderer with correct ticks and reliable hit testing is heavy canvas work that AI implementations usually make expensive and buggy. flame-chart-js renders time-based flame charts, marks, and multi-track waterfalls from span/node data and includes zoom/pan interaction.

data_in.note: data is a node tree in which each node is { name, start, duration, children? }. start/duration use the same time unit (commonly ms) and map to absolute coordinates on a shared timeline; children nest by call depth. Rendering targets an explicitly sized canvas, whose width/height must be in pixels (no vh).

data.name: string -- Node label
data.color?: string -- Node color; derived from name by default
data.children?: FlameChartNode[] -- Child nodes (nested spans); none by default

schema.colors?: Record<string,string> -- Maps type names to colors; automatic by default
schema.marks?: [{ shortName, fullName, timestamp, color }] -- Timeline marks; none by default

spec.note: Renders into the supplied canvas. canvas.width/height must be explicit pixels (container clientWidth + fixed height 400); vh/percentage height is prohibited (Rule 3). Reset canvas.width when dimensions change.
